title: capsicum tovarii
intro: Capsicum tovarii, also known as the Papantla chilli, is a species of wild pepper native to Mexico. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to alleviate pain and reduce swelling. The plant's medicinal properties also make it beneficial for respiratory issues, such as coughs and congestion, as well as for its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can help to boost the immune system and protect against infections. Capsicum tovarii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
